title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts  - Settings toggles On/Off
feature: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts
scenario: Verify notification and device alert toggles in General > Notification tab can be switched On/Off and persist after reopening the tab and restarting the app
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to General > Notification tab.
2. Locate the notification toggle and switch it ON.
3. Locate the device alert settings toggle and switch it ON.
4. Navigate away from the tab and then reopen General > Notification tab.
5. Verify that both toggles remain ON.
7. Navigate back to General > Notification tab.
8. Verify that both toggles still remain ON.
10. Switch the device alert settings toggle OFF.
11. Navigate away and reopen the tab, then restart the app again.
12. Verify that both toggles remain OFF.
13. Set all toggles to ON and repeat steps 4-8.
14. Set all toggles to OFF and repeat steps 9-12.
expected: Notification and device alert settings toggles can be switched On/Off, and their selected state persists after reopening the tab and after restarting the app for all scenarios (individual toggles, all ON, all OFF).
